channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Paris Saint-Germain staves off Villa comeback to reach Champions League semifinals
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, England (AP) — Their players were rattled. Their goalkeeper was pulling off save after save. For Paris Saint-Germain, another brutal “remontada” looked on the cards in the Champions League. This time, the French champions just about hung on.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dolphins pursuing trade options for All-Pro cornerback Jalen Ramsey
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The Miami Dolphins are pursuing trade options for All-Pro cornerback Jalen Ramsey, general manager Chris Grier confirmed on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Guirassy scores a hat trick in vain for Dortmund as Barcelona advances to Champions League semis
item.description: Serhou Guirassy has scored a hat trick and still ended up on the losing side as Borussia Dortmund’s 3-1 win over Barcelona wasn’t enough to prevent a 5-3 aggregate loss to Barcelona in the Champions League quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: April 15 is Jackie Robinson Day around Major League Baseball
item.description: Jackie Robinson’s legacy is being celebrated around the major leagues, with the day named for the first Black baseball player of the modern era and marking the 78th anniversary of his debut for the Brooklyn Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Tyron Smith set to retire with Cowboys after final season with Jets, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of Tyron Smith's plans says the perennial Pro Bowl left tackle is set to retire with the Dallas Cowboys after spending his final season with the New York Jets.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: World Cup poster for New York/New Jersey revealed
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The official 2026 World Cup poster for New York/New Jersey has been revealed. The New York New Jersey Host Committee unveiled the poster on Monday. It was designed by Rich Tu, a Brooklyn-based artist from New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: The NBA playoffs will, once again, be an international showcase of stars
item.description: They’ll be watching in Canada, not just because of Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, though the NBA’s scoring champion and MVP favorite who plays for Oklahoma City surely helps lure in fans who are north of the border.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine school district moves to ban trans athletes from girls' sports, siding with Trump over state authorities
item.description: The MSAD #70 School Board in Maine voted unanimously to follow the federal definition of Title IX, and only recognize two sexes amid ongoing state conflict.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy has the Masters and a Grand Slam. That gives him freedom to chase more
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The Mount Rushmore of golf now has six faces carved into granite, and for that Rory McIlroy should feel as though he achieved the highest pinnacle in golf. But there is so much more ahead for McIlroy.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yanks' Jasson Domínguez, with catch of Salvador Perez's drive, shows learning curve in left field
item.description: Maligned for dubious defense when the New York Yankees first moved him to left field last year, Jasson Domínguez made their best catch of the early season when he robbed Salvador Perez of an extra-base hit in a 4-1 win over the Kansas City Royals.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: High school softball rankings, April 15, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: Capuchino, Liberty enter the rankings, Valley Christian slides up as several teams make big moves after busy week of Bay Area high school softball
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Concerns mount at Red Bull after Verstappen's 'catastrophe' as F1 heads to Saudi Arabia
item.description: Max Verstappen and Red Bull are one of Formula 1's all-time most successful partnerships. But a disastrous race has raised concerns Verstappen could consider a move elsewhere. Following the Bahrain Grand Prix, Verstappen talked of a “catastrophe” as he listed the problems.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rome derby clashes likened to 'urban warfare' with 24 police officers injured
item.description: The toll from clashes between violent fans and police ahead of the Rome derby includes 24 police officers injured, seven arrests and at least 40,000 euros in damaged garbage dumpsters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wings select Paige Bueckers No. 1 overall in 2025 WNBA Draft
item.description: UConn Huskies star Paige Bueckers has officially become the first overall pick of the 2025 WNBA Draft to the Dallas Wings, kicking off what many expect to be a great pro transition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears sign Kyler Gordon to record extension, make him highest-paid slot corner in NFL
item.description: The Chicago Bears have agreed to a three-year, $40 million contract extension with corner Kyler Gordon, making him one of the highest-paid corners in the NFL and keeping him in Chicago for at least the next four seasons.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Texas man suing NFL player over December shooting at car lot
item.description: A Texas man who says Titans cornerback L'Jarius Sneed or his personal assistant shot at him while he was sitting inside a Mercedes-Benz on a dealer lot in December is suing for at least $1 million.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Race fans brace the rain for 1st race of Spring Tripleheader in Bristol Motor Speedway
item.description: Despite the weather, fans still showed up to enjoy the Bristol Motor Speedway on Friday night to see their favorite NASCAR drivers.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Augusta man attends 62 Masters in a row
item.description: For many people, they’ll wait their whole life to go to The Masters. For others, they’ve been going their whole life.
item.dc:creator: Karlton Clay, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lonzo Ball meets family of meniscus donor who helped revive his NBA career
item.description: The Reinhardt family donated Alex's organs, which helped save the life of Chicago Bulls guard Lonzo Ball after he underwent cadaver meniscus transplant surgery.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
